scripts.test:e2e:docker: docker build -t cosmos-journeyer-e2e -f ./Dockerfile ../.. && docker run --rm --ipc=host -e CI=1 -v "$(pwd)/../../artifacts:/output" -v "$(pwd)/tests:/app/packages/playground/tests" cosmos-journeyer-e2e npx playwright test --config packages/playground/playwright.config.ts --output=/output --reporter=line,html
scripts.test:e2e:docker:update: docker build -t cosmos-journeyer-e2e -f ./Dockerfile ../.. && docker run --rm --ipc=host -e CI=1 -v "$(pwd)/../../artifacts:/output" -v "$(pwd)/tests:/app/packages/playground/tests" cosmos-journeyer-e2e npx playwright test --config packages/playground/playwright.config.ts --output=/output --reporter=line,html --update-snapshots
